title: U.S. Strikes Hit Greater Tunb Island in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The U.S. military said on Wednesday it had attacked Iranian cruise missile storage and launch sites on Greater Tunb, one of several small islands in the Strait of Hormuz subject to a decades-old territorial dispute.
summary_public: The U.S. military said on Wednesday it had attacked Iranian cruise missile storage and launch sites on Greater Tunb, one of several small islands in the Strait of Hormuz subject to a decades-old territorial dispute.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian cruise missile storage and launch sites
